The NFTX story does not end on January 31st...

On January 31st, 2026 the UIs for NFTX V2 and V3 will be switched off. 

The protocols will remain active (as smart contracts live forever), but will no longer be supported or managed by the original team. 

While this does mark the end of support for NFTX, we are continuing our mission to build radical products onchain through Flayer Labs. 

The future will be onchain, and we're going to push the boundaries of what decentralized infrastructure can enable ￼
The future of finance is milady.

$FLAY is live. 

Learn how to migrate your $NFTX tokens to $FLAY

A new wind blows.

⚜️Introducing $FLAYER

A new token central to the entire @FlayerApp ecosystem. NFT liquidity, [redacted], [redacted] and [redacted] - all powered by $FLAYER

Existing $NFTX and $FLOOR tokens held by our community will be migrated over at TGE in late Q3. All governance tokens held by the team treasury will be burned.

As part of the migration process, existing $NFTX liquidity on AMMs will be pulled in 24 hours.

After this, until ƒlayer TGE, no tokens will be available to swap.

If you are interested in what we are building at @FlayerApp, this is your last chance to acquire $NFTX and $FLOOR before TGE.

🚨ATTENTION🚨

In less than 24 hours, as an effect of the Project New Wind proposal, NFTX will be temporarily pulling $PUNK and $GLYPH liquidity from all uniswap v3 and NFTX v3 pools.  

Users will have until tomorrow to buy or sell any of these vTokens. Only liquidity is being pulled - inventory in vaults remain unaffected.  

As we gear up for the merge and launch of @FlayerApp we are temporarily dividing our assets to consolidate our treasury. Liquidity will be added back at a later date. All changes to token liquidity will be provided with prior notice.

🚨Attention NFTX Voters🚨 

The snapshot vote for XIP-56 has concluded with the approval of Project New Wind.   

With this vote passed, we will begin the merge of @NFTX_ and @FloorDAO into @FlayerApp     

What does this mean if you're an NFTX user and token holder? 

Most importantly, user funds are not affected in any way: 
🪙$NFTX and $FLOOR token holders will be able to swap their tokens for the new token before Flayer is launched  

NFTX v2 and v3 will continue to be fully supported while we build @FlayerApp. Users can still mint, redeem and swap their assets while earning yield on their NFTs.  

The entire proposal and all of its implications can be read in full here: https://t.co/qWdWB8u2mM

PROJECT NEW WIND
XIP-56 is now live on snapshot vote
NFTX VOTING: https://t.co/qWdWB8u2mM
